meaning: vt.璧斿伩,琛ュ伩,鎵ｉ櫎vi.琛ュ伩鎹熷け
examples: We hope to recoup our initial investment in the first year.
Insurance companies are trying to recoup their losses by increasing premiums.
They are trying to recoup themselves for their losses.
That would also allow the Falcons to recoup some of what they have paid their quarterback.
That means using existing tax law in a clever way to recoup what's rightfully yours.
